subject: [PATCH 22/24] nfsd: properly track requested child attributes

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of child attributes in NFSv4 delegation by tracking the union of requested and supported attributes, and only encoding the attributes in that union when sending add/remove/rename updates. This ensures that only relevant attributes are sent to the client, reducing unnecessary data transfer and improving performance. The patch also introduces new macros to define the bitmasks for child attributes, making the code more readable and maintainable.
